about.en: RedStone is an oracle network that delivers price feeds and off-chain data to DeFi, RWA, and smart contract applications. Its modular design supports multiple delivery models for data consumers across EVM and non-EVM ecosystems. RED is used for governance, staking, security, and incentives in the RedStone oracle network.
about.es: RedStone es una red de oraculos que entrega precios y datos off-chain a aplicaciones DeFi, RWA y smart contracts. Su diseno modular soporta varios modelos de entrega para consumidores de datos en ecosistemas EVM y no EVM. RED se usa para gobernanza, staking, seguridad e incentivos en la red de oraculos RedStone.
about.ca: RedStone es una xarxa d'oracles que entrega preus i dades off-chain a aplicacions DeFi, RWA i smart contracts. El seu disseny modular suporta diversos models d'entrega per a consumidors de dades en ecosistemes EVM i no EVM. RED s'usa per a governanca, staking, seguretat i incentius en la xarxa d'oracles RedStone.
